text:
On Saturday 07 July 2001 13:31, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> For upgrades you usually need to send diff's instead of shar's

No problem.  Attached is the output of running:

  $ diff iNaur isearch.orig isearch

Let me know if you have any problems with this.
